hotel_name: Merci Sunset Town Phú Quốc (Merci Sunset Town Phu Quoc)

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: There is no set up reception. no people to help. if you whatsapp no one will respond. i found fungus in the Kettle. I messaged and no one responded.

reviews.title: Blood on bedsheets they refuse to change
reviews.positives:
Very beautiful design of the room
They did our laundry quick and for a good price 
Good wifi
Free Netflix
reviews.negatives:
There was blood on our bedsheets and they didn’t change it until next day, it’s disgusting. 
They didn’t clean our room for the whole week not even once. Dirty glasses with lipstick. When we asked, they said it will be done tomorrow but they never came. Didn’t change our towels, didn’t take out the trash, didn’t give us more hand soap. 
Smell from the sewerage is horrible and very strong. We needed to open windows to get rid of it.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: This is the worst place ever, the rooms are terrible, the beddings look funny with stains, the tubs are stained and the sink leaks.

reviews.title: Nice room, beautiful views but the worst service.
reviews.positives: The room looked exactly like it does in the pictures. The WiFi was good and the location was good too (with a bit of walking up the stairs). From our room, we could see the fire works and a bit of the kiss bridge.
reviews.negatives: The property has absolutely no room-service. You are on your own. Starting from check-in, the hotel does not have a reception so you call a number (that takes hours to acknowledge you). Some people waited an hour or more before being checked in. Once we got into the room, it was not well cleaned, the bed sheets and pillows were stained. The bathroom was the worst part — there was mold by the shower floor, the bath tub had very questionable marks too, it had a dried up brown stain inside and a strange brown one outside too so we never used it the entire stay.  This is probably because the hotel doesn’t necessarily have a cleaning stuff, they just have two ladies “cleaning” the entire hotel. When we checked-in the tissue rolls were empty and the shower gel was finished so we had to go to Tony’s and get them because we were on our own. There is no cleaning services, not even someone to come collect trash. We did not even have a trash can/bin besides the small sanitary pads bin in the bathroom, so we had to buy plastic bags and ask the cleaning ladies to take them whenever they were full. The walls are also very thin, so you can hear your neighbors (just hope they aren’t loud, intoxicated and start arguing because Merci Hotel will not help you). Merci hotels should just call itself “Merci Apartments” because they are not a hotel. It’s so sad because the rooms themselves are aesthetically pleasing and comfortable (besides the dirt), the property has so much potential, if only it could be well managed/ran like a hotel.

reviews.title: WORST HOTEL EVER
reviews.text:
guys, PLEASE DO NOT BOOK THIS 'HOTEL'. The check in time is 14:00, we arrived locked outside the hotel, we waited in the sun for 20mins without anyone providing us the passcode in whatsapp. We waited for another 20mins before we could check in.

The water is ORANGE (we brought our own shower head filter), the slippers are dirty and there were trash in the balcony. They clearly DID NOT clean the room thoroughly. Poor privacy, people from the next room can literally walk into our balcony. At this point we still thought we could work with that.

We came back to the hotel after watching the popular kiss of the sea show at 22:00, and soon found out there are DOZENS of ants crawling in the bed and on the pillows, also some body hair.

We contacted the hotel right away and they accused us for eating in the bed?????REALLY?? Then they just ghosted us. GREAT SERVICE.

We booked with another hotel right away, we just could not stay here. 

worst experience ever
reviews.room_type: Executive Suite with Balcony and Ocean View

reviews.title: Good room unprofessional staff
reviews.positives: Clean room and nice view
reviews.negatives: The staff were very unprofessional. Never came into our room to clean and then on the last day when we where sleeping came in without knocking and realized we were sleeping so left. They didn’t take payment on arrival as they forgot and spam messaged me hello hello hello so I would come pay even though it was only day 2 of our stay. Very unpleasant

reviews.title: Pathetic Do Not Book
reviews.text:
The location is far from the main city, huge walking dist to kiss bridge and restaurants. Really close to jungle. 
No staff at night, actually there is just 1 boy in the staff who leaves the building in evening! The girl in side room cried and called for help due to some insect coming in her room but the guy did not come only when we threatened him of cops he came and spoke rudely, denied room change and left us hanging for the night. Could not sleep. The bathtub and shower both dont have hot water . Room is smaller than it looks we took junior suite w balcony. They dont even have breakfast services. No value for money and overall terrible experience.

reviews.title: Nice location, value for money but next time I will find another stay.
reviews.positives: Good location in Sunset town that takes proper walk to get to main streets. Bed was comfortable and appropriate size of the TV. They had free Netflix. Sea and fireworks were seeable from my room.
reviews.negatives: There is no hotel reception. They only show up when you check in and that's all. There is a possibility to chat with them via Whatsapp and other SNS but they won't respond. I tried to use laundry service and texted to the staff but they keep ghosting. They only reply if I request paid attraction.

reviews.title: Very bad hotel
reviews.text: There used to be no one at the reception most of the time, water clogged in the bathroom once, very poor service, there were no room service or cleaning, had to ask for towel change

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: View
reviews.negatives: Slow watering when shower

reviews.title: No staff at reception whenever we need them
reviews.text: Check in timing shows 12 but hotel won't allow before 2

reviews.title: Good with nice view.
reviews.positives: Near to sun kiss bridge north gate. Can watch water show & fireworks from my hotel room
reviews.negatives: Thin walls, you can hear loud sounds from nearby rooms. However im ok with it cos at least I know there are people nearby me.

reviews.title: There is no receptionist.
reviews.text: My friend and I stayed for 3 days and 2 nights, but the accommodation did not change the towels. I already asked for it, but on the last day of the stay, the water had a strange smell and the water was still not flowing.

reviews.title: Great location and beautiful experience overall !
reviews.positives: Stayed here for 1 night at Sunset Town and enjoyed the fireworks right from my balcony. Very beautiful experience and honestly the best! The staff were also very friendly and welcoming.
reviews.negatives: However, there was a sudden electricity problem from 5am until check out, so I had to check out early due to the inconvenience.

reviews.title: Disappointing stay overall
reviews.text: The location was a highlight, offering easy access to local attractions, but the cleanliness was lacking and amenities were minimal. Despite being able to sleep well, the overall experience was marred by unhelpful staff and inadequate facilities. Transport options were not ideal, making it hard to explore further afield. While it had potential, the numerous shortcomings overshadowed any positives during the stay.

reviews.title: Incredible
reviews.positives: The room is modern, clean, but surprisingly is in budget price. The owner even let me to check in early at 11 without any charge fee! I can see the kiss bridge from the balcony and everywhere can be reached by walking.
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Okay but you can try once at your choice.
reviews.text: The hotel is okay. But please make sure you carry cash only. Else at the reception you will be charged for a 5% extra card transaction fee which is unfair. Safety wise this is a fine place. But the bed mattress had red ants all over them which made us uncomfortable during the stay. Later during cash payment the hotel guy was kind enough to pass on a discount of 50k VND.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The location is good . New room with good facilities.  I love this hotel.
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Meh
reviews.text: Like what all the reviews said, this hotel dont have any lobby, you have to whatsapp the number once you arrived. Have to add 250k dong for extra person. The aircond is so hot, we whatsapp the owner but no reply till we checked out the next morning. Just know that we can actually opened all rooms, except those who are occupied bcs the room keys are INSIDE the room itself. The balcony actually connected to the room beside!! As we travel with only girls, this is quite concerning. We can actually just go and knock or see the room beside us through the balcony. Pros is from your balcony, you could see the fireshow everynight. Others, not quite satisfied
reviews.room_type: Executive Suite with Balcony and Ocean View

reviews.title: no
reviews.positives: no
reviews.negatives: no

reviews.title: Worst hotel
reviews.text: This is by far the worst hotel I ever stay. On the first day of check in, around night time there’s was big storm and rain very heavily and the rain came into my bathroom so I was texting the staff to sent 1-2 towels so I can covered the rain that going in to the bathroom but the staff said they cannot send it. Which very irritating for guest. Then they said only can send new towels 2days after staying and water bottle as well which they never do. Some more the sink area got so many ant I didn’t even know where they came from after I clean it up also.  Will never booked this hotel ever again.
reviews.room_type: Executive Suite with Balcony and Ocean View

reviews.title: Super nice experience, recommended.
reviews.positives: Super cute and comfortable room, enough space for myself and loved the modern decoration style. Also super comfy bed.
reviews.negatives: It doesn’t have a view as the building in front is covering it and so close. But that doesn’t affect at all the quality of the stay in my opinion.

reviews.title: Dishonest staff/s
reviews.text: We left our hair iron though we know that it is our fault, but the thing is upon check out at 11 am we stayed at Sunset Town until 1:30 pm before going to the airport which is already enough time for them to inform us that we left a thing inside our room but they dis not even bothered. We only found out about this when we're already in Saigon. We immediately messaged them but the staff didn't reply, she just seen our message. The hotel has the best spot with clean and spacious room but their staff was just dishonest
reviews.room_type: Executive Suite with Balcony and Ocean View

reviews.title: Good place to stay in Sunset Town - Phu Quoc
reviews.positives:
New hotel, spacious room with all facilities needed and the price is cheap
Hotel is near the beach and Kiss Bridge where you can get pretty beautiful sunset and it is close to Night Market with a lot of delicious foods
The owner is quite friendly
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Staff was not there for anything….room was not so clean and nobody in staff stay at night…when we call staff on what’s app they did not response.. location is nice … you can view kiss bridge from balcony but not child friendly
reviews.room_type: Executive Suite with Balcony and Ocean View

reviews.title: Da evitare
reviews.positives: La vista mare dal balcone
reviews.negatives: Per effettuare il check in abbiamo dovuto aspettare 10 minuti dopo aver chiamato il numero affisso alla porta dell'hotel, la camera non era stata pulita dopo i precedenti neanche le lenzuola peli e polvere ovunque ed abbiamo dovuto chiedere di farle cambiare, asciugamani e lenzuola vecchie e macchiate, animaletti e farfalline dello sporco a migliaia. In 4 giorni non hanno mai pulito la camera ma solo cambiato le asciugamani il terzo giorno

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Check-in time is 2 PM, but when I arrived at 3 PM, the room had not been cleaned yet; there was still trash and blankets from the previous guest. Upon arriving at the hotel, there was no reception, and when I called the phone number provided at the reception desk, no one answered. The water in the toilet ran all night, which was very noisy, and the sound insulation was poor, so the traffic from the road below was also loud, making it difficult to sleep.

reviews.title: Surreale
reviews.positives:
La posizione e le stanze luminose ed accoglienti, alcune con tre finestre e bagni molto carini.
Le suite sono dotate di una bella vista sul mare che consente di assistere agli spettacoli pirotecnici serali.
Contesto surreale di recente costruzione con assenza di reception.
Tuttavia il ragazzo addetto alla gestione della struttura una volta chiamato arriva e svolge gli adempimenti basilari.
reviews.negatives:
L’impatto iniziale quando uno arriva poiché sembra abbandonato.
Il taxi chiamerà per voi il numero esposto fuori ed arriverà qualcuno.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: The hotel signboard was too small, I almost skip to another road because i cannot find the hotel at first. The room was okay. But got some unpleasant smell. The lift was too small. The staff should learn simple english so much easy to communicate with customers.

reviews.title: 今まで世界中で5つ星からドミトリーまで数百ヶ所以上泊まった中で、ワースト3に入るくらいの宿。
reviews.positives:
ロケーションはまぁまぁ良い。
宿泊した部屋からの景色はよかった。
reviews.negatives:
不潔。ゴミの中で生活してる最悪な経験。
排水口がコバエの家になっていた。
タオルが臭い。
対応が遅い。
ホテルに対する愛情が薄い。
設備が整っていない。

もし、お湯の供給がちゃんとしていた場合、バスタブから海が見えるのは良いと思うが、お湯の供給がほとんど追い付いてない時点で飾りだった。

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Because it's was a 3 stars hotel, I understand I cannot expect it was good.  They didn't put any trash bin except the one in the toilet.  By the way, it's quite cheap.

reviews.title: BEST ROOM ! with great view.
reviews.text: I have doub to choose this hotel at first place, due to review. however turn out it was everage for me and also happy for me. evarage stay because of no lobby and facilities provided. but they do have elavator to lv3/4/5. you need to reach the owner thru whatsapp.  the room was great and nice for . howver my room leaking and my bed was soaked with water from A/C. a fews stained and hair on floor. Toilet smell bad. but it's okay i bring my air freshner . i like the room beacuse spaciou and have tub in toilet vioew firework view. OMG so enjoy !! when you in bath tub at night wait 8:30pm for firework show. so memorable moments.  the bedsheet so crumpled i dont know wether they all washed or not. but i do see th washing machine down there. but mybe crumple because of directly use after from machine.  HOWEVER I LOVE MY STAY AT MERCI . PLEASE CHOOSE ROOM 302 ! Or any floor with 02 !! u will get best view at night.

reviews.title: Acceptable

reviews.negatives: Phòng nghỉ hướng nhìn vào toà khác, cảm giác ga giường ko được thay sờ vào rất sạn, khăn tắm mùi cực kỳ kinh làm mình ám ảnh cả chuyến đi.

reviews.negatives: bồn tắm chưa được dọn sạch lắm, vẫn còn cặn.

reviews.title: Very good

reviews.title: Tuyệt
reviews.positives: Phòng đẹp, sang trọng, mới
reviews.negatives: Ổn

reviews.title: You pay for what you get
reviews.text: This is a budget hotel with no reception staff, you are given a key when you check in and will occasionally see members of staff there during your stay. The room was fine, everything worked and the location was good. Zero room service and no cleaning done, if you want clean towels go to the basement floors in the lift and help yourself there.  Anyone giving this place a bad review  have failed to realsiie that you pay for what you get, for what I paid I think this was hotel was fine, the staff I dealt with were friendly and the room was great for the price. If you want all the thrills of a fancy hotel then pay more. I was there in peak season for 4 nights and paid £***, an absolute bargain IMO.

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.text:
Great location near to Indian restaurants.
Only disadvantage is in night hours no one is at reception.

reviews.title: chắc chắn sẽ quay lại vì view quá tuyệt vời
reviews.positives: chỗ ở có view rất đẹp, bồn tắm hướng ra biển và cầu hôn, view thoáng , điểm đón hoàng hôn siêu đỉnh, đứng từ ban công và tắm bồn nhìn ra cả 1 bầu trời đỏ rực, khách sạn còn khá mới nên t1 chưa setup , năm sau quay lại chắc chắn lung linh lun, em cực kì thích hotel và chị quản lý siêu nice, nhiệt tình chu đáo , takecare tụi em tốt ạ
reviews.negatives: ko chê điểm gì về dịch vụ phòng và view, em thì thích khoá từ bằng thẻ nên bên mih đổi quá loại đó cho tiện, tại tính em hay quên khoá lắm

reviews.title: Good hotel close to all the main attractions at sunset town
reviews.text: This is more of an apartment than a hotel but the view from the balcony of the kiss of the sea show and fireworks was incredible. The balcony is spacious and is a nice spot to relax and watch the skyline but is only separated from the next door balcony by some plants.   The location is excellent since it's only a 20 min walk to the cable car station and kiss bridge and even to the vuifest bazaar. Since everything was within walking distance it was great for us as we planned on covering sunset town in a day because there's not much else to see there. Do keep in mind also that since this is not a 'hotel' there's nobody at the reception usually. The owner sends the passkey and room details before check-in and you can get in that way. This makes for an easy check out process as well. Overall, great budget friendly stay if you plan your itinerary in sunset town!
reviews.room_type: Executive Suite with Balcony and Ocean View

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Mình thấy khu cũng thuận tiện.

reviews.title: The accommodation location is fine.
reviews.text: New room, convenient, located in the sunset town. I rented a motorbike to run around, very convenient.

reviews.title: Nếu bạn tìm một căn phòng để chill thì thật sự đây là một lựa chọn không thể bỏ qua

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Все было вполне нормально, пока во вторую ночь моего проживания в этом отеле, меня не покусали клопы. Это неприемлемо, вы должны немедленно что-то с этим сделать!!!

reviews.title: Great stay with minor issues
reviews.text: The room size was impressive and had parking space. However, the housekeeping could use some improvement as it didn’t meet expectations. No receptionist present. No service

reviews.title: Номер с неработающим туалетом 301
reviews.positives: Хорошо работал кондиционер. Ванна удобная и большого размера.
reviews.negatives: Всё в этом номере сделано по вьетнамски. В туалете не работал смыв (вода набирается со скоростью что можно смыть один раз в день), об этом неоднократно говорил персоналу на ресепшене, и за 3 дня, пока мы там были так ничего не исправили. Хотя обещали каждый день. Какашки смывали ведром. По номеру бегал большой таракан. Сбоку от кровати слой пыли. Холодильник с огромной намерзлой льдиной. Сли в ванной сделан через жопу, когда моешься в душе, пол во всей ванной будет мокрым, хотя душ в отдельной кабинке. Не рекомендую.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
Hotel bersih. My honest review 9/10
1 kurang sbb hotel sebelah dia bersepah jadi nak ambil gmbr peti balkoni tu jd tak lawa
reviews.room_type: Executive Suite with Balcony and Ocean View

reviews.title: Красивый номер с красивыми видами
reviews.positives:
Оригинальный номер с продуманным современным дизайном, красивый вид из окна! 
Рекомендую!
reviews.negatives:
утром шум стройки, так что насладиться открытыми окнами не удалось. 
Отсутствие чашек, есть только стаканы, не возможно попить чай, кофе. 
Были какие-то неполадки с кондиционером. утром образовалась лужа на полу.
Видно, что еще данный бизнес не работает в полную силу и нет постоянного персонала в гостинице. 
Когда приезжаете ,то вас никто не встречает, надо написать в WhatsApp, после моего сообщения только через 15 минут подошел работник. Далее мы ждали еще 15 минут и только потом нам предложили номер, не тот что бронировали. Мы сообщили, что это не наш номер и в номере имеется запах табачного дыма. нам сказали, что наш номер еще не готов, будет готов примерно через 40 минут. На часах было уже около 16-00, время заезда 14-00, перед заездом я писала запрос в отель о заезде в 15-00 и он был подтвержден. 
Эти все нюансы немного испортили впечатления и больше относятся к организации заезда, нежели к номеру и проживанию в нем, потому в целом я ставлю высокую оценку этому объекту! Желаю успехов!

reviews.title: Balcony Junior Suite
reviews.text: This room is more spacious and also can see fireworks from balcony.. they provide smart tv and my little one enjoyed his cartoons

reviews.title: Фото соответствует, но сервис хромает
reviews.positives: Отличная локация в шаговой доступности к набережной и ночному рынку. В тоже время тихо и нет фоновой музыки на улице, что надоедает в других отелях. Номер соответствует фото- просторно, светло. В ванной есть всё необходимые принадлежности. Отвечали на звонки оперативно. У нас был угловой номер, потому окна-балкон выходили на угол 😇 и частично видно море и канатную дорогу. Вечером с балкона видны фейерверки. Хорошее соответствие цена- качество
reviews.negatives: Мы гостили здесь 4 ночи. За это время в наших апартаментах ни разу не мыли полы и не было смены полотенец. Мусор мы выносили сами ( мусорка за углом). Не оборудован ресепшен: стойка есть, но администратора нет. Не ответили на сообщение в букинг ком, пришлось звонить. Ванна классная, но будьте готовы, что вода будет уходить часа 2. В душевой сток работает тоже не очень, вода постоянно выходила за дверь душевой, если мыться больше 1-2 минут в душе.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Satisfied
reviews.room_type: Executive Suite with Balcony and Ocean View

reviews.title: Вид с балкона перекрыл всё не достатки
reviews.positives: Хороший номер, прекрасный вид с балкона. Каждый вечер можно было наблюдать фейерверк. Не сливалась вода в ванной, сообщила об этом, пригласили на следующий день  работника. Опоздал к оговоренному времени на час, в итоге просто её подвинул за 5 минут, чтоб дырки совпадали. Всё заработало.
reviews.negatives: Бесконтактное заселение, отвечают не сразу. Номер не был готов к 14:00. В холодильнике наледь и снежная шапка, но я им не пользовалась. Шторы на одном окне держались не на всех крючках. Недостаточно чисто,  вода на полу после принятия душа стоит и в туалете и в ванной, т. к. пол на одном уровне. Стены, как из бумаги, всё и всех слышно. Перед моим номером на 4 эт на потолке была дыра, кусок потолка обвалился. Заходить нужно было аккуратно и быстро, не хлопая дверью, чтоб ничего на голову не упало. В остальном всё хорошо.

reviews.title: Great views
reviews.text: The views from the room was amazing with clear views of the fireworks show at night from the balcony. The room was satisfactory enough. Location-wise, everywhere was reachable so nothing to worry about this. The downside was just the water pressure was bit low so it took a very long while for the tub and the sink to drain. Maybe need to look at this. As for the checking in, i think the property should let the travelers know in advanced on how to check in as it is done remotely. Else need to wait quite a while at the lobby. Not a problem, just probably can be improved. Recommended!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
В отеле пока не оборудован ресепшен. Номера хорошие, соответствуют фото. У нас был номер с видом на море. Вид просто потрясающий. В целом всё шикарно!
Из пожеланий, хотелось бы чтобы было больше туалетной бумаги ( на 3 дня нам достался заканчивающийся рулон), ну и чтобы воду пополняли каждый день!

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: As we received information we can leave at 1200 but actually we have to leave the room at 1120 without information before, other is very good  and staff at reception room, i would like to thank you for helping us find taxi to central

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Sängen var skön och överlag fräscht
reviews.negatives:
Handdukarna luktade surt och sängkläderna var aningen smutsiga 
Läget är speciellt en tom låtsasstad

reviews.title: Stay
reviews.text: Room was good i stayed 2 days but they did clean after a day

reviews.title: Oprócz lokalizacji nic nie ma do zaoferowania.
reviews.positives: Dobra lokalizacja, na przeciwko bardzo dobra restauracja.
reviews.negatives: Bardzo brudno, pościel z żółtymi i czarnymi plamami, śmierdząca, po zwróceniu uwagi obsługa wymieniła, ale była podobna do tej zastanej po przyjeździe. Dookoła łóżka, w łazience i w zasadzie na każdej powierzchni czyjeś włosy. Przy braniu prysznica z każdej możliwej strony wylewa się woda i zalewa „łazienkę”. Niesprzątane oraz brak wymiany ręczników przez cały pobyt (4 noce). Poprosiłam chociaż o papier toaletowy (była jedna rolka), pani sprzątająca powiedziała, że pójdzie do sklepu kupić, ale to ja sama musiłam się tam wybrać, bo się nie doczekałam. Nikt nie mówi po angielsku, nawet w stopniu podstawowym, pani na recepcji wiecznie nie ma. Całą noc i poranek pod oknem piały koguty pozamykane w klatkach przez co uniemożliwiały sen z otwartym oknem. Na miejscu dowiedzieliśmy się, że płatność tylko gotówką, ale po interwencji zgodziła się na płatność kartą, chociaż paragonu nie dostałam. Klimatyzacja chyba nigdy nie odgrzybiona, śmierdzi z kanalizacji, podświetlane lustro też nie działa. W wannie i umywalce rdza i grzyb.

reviews.title: Review hotel
reviews.text: I stayed two days in hotel. Everything was perfect 👌. I recommend this hotel

reviews.title: Unfortunately, the lack of cleanliness and difficulty reaching staff made the stay very unpleasant.
reviews.positives: I love how close the property is to everything — the location is incredibly convenient. We can even watch the fireworks right from room 403, which is a huge bonus. Overall, the place has a lot of potential.
reviews.negatives:
We arrived at the property around 11 AM and there was no one at reception. A number and Wi-Fi password were displayed, so we messaged that number and were told check-in was at 2 PM. That was fine, so we went out and returned at 5 PM. We messaged the same number again but received no reply for 30 minutes. I contacted the booking.com number and finally got a response with an apology and an offer to upgrade our room to watch fireworks. She said she would inform the staff.

When we arrived, a man took us to Room 203. By then it was already 5:30 PM, and we were tired and just wanted to rest. When we tried to lie on the bed, we noticed the bedsheets were extremely dirty — stains and dust everywhere. I sent photos to the staff and asked for help. He told us to wait 5 minutes, but after 20 minutes with no update, I messaged the booking.com number again. Around 6:10 PM the man finally came and moved us to Room 403.

We were hoping this room would be clean, especially after the upgrade, but it was the same — dirty sheets, dusty room, stained toilet and bathtub. Everything felt unhygienic and uncomfortable.

The next day, I spoke to the man and two ladies about the cleanliness. They told me sheets are only changed every two days. I explained again and even said (in Vietnamese using translation) that I was happy to change the linens myself if they could give me fresh ones. They apologised but didn’t do anything. Later I texted the man again asking for fresh towels, but received no reply.

Overall, it was a very bad experience. The lack of cleanliness and poor communication completely ruined our holiday.

reviews.title: Unique Experience
reviews.text: This hotel was one of the best places I have ever stayed at in my entire life. You wouldn’t believe how great the room is and how stunning the city view is! The bathtub is amazing, the alley is very quiet, and they even play slow music at night in the streets. Don’t think twice about staying here—it’s completely worth more than the money, and I truly mean it!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Aircond & water heater is not working good, dusty, staff didnt know basic english, hard to communicate.

reviews.title: 8/10 - really comfy bed
reviews.text:
A very pretty & comfy room with a great view! Very cheap as well. I noticed that the place is still being developed and we experience some issues with the bathroom drainages. They weren't clogged, they just weren't installed properly so the water wasn't draining well.

Nonetheless, everything went well with this hotel and will def book this again when I am in Sunset town.

reviews.title: Overall is good, just shower needs to be improved
reviews.positives: A budget hotel with magnificent view — able to view firework directly from window
reviews.negatives: Water runs very slow and it sometimes stops running.

reviews.title: Amazing view
reviews.text: The hotel is good a great value for money. I booked the executive suite and it had an amazing view of the ocean. I could see the shows and fireworks from my balcony.
reviews.room_type: Executive Suite with Balcony and Ocean View

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:

reviews.negatives:

Staff was the worst

I was made to wait 1 hour to checkin she said she had multiple properties

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: I love the view so much as I can see the Kiss Bridge clearly . The view worth the price and exactly the same as the picture
reviews.room_type: Executive Suite with Balcony and Ocean View

reviews.title: Ok stay as close to Kiss bridge
reviews.positives:
Exceptional location, nearby kiss bridge and many Indian restaurants..
Bathtub n room was good
reviews.negatives: Room was not cleaned on daily basis. Also looks like room is not maintained well .. They have good amenities however maintain ace is needed to sustain it .. Example: Bathroom door handle was loose , leakage from bathroom to the room .. AC almost non existent as very less cooling.

reviews.title: Check-in is difficult.
reviews.text: The room was very nice, the amenities were great, but it was a bit far from the restaurant area, the kiss bridge, and the gondola. I didn't really like the check-in and check-out process, it was difficult. The first floor felt like an empty hotel under construction, with not much furniture and no reception. There was an A4 sign at the counter asking to call for check-in which was hard to contact. The hotel sign was small and looked unofficial. The accommodation and furniture in the room were really good and the price was reasonable, but the water pipe had a bit of a bad smell.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: the location, the amazing view from the hugh balcony. You get to see the fireworks every night from the balcony. Comfortable bed and good shower. A modern room overall.
reviews.negatives: The hotel is not finished, when you arrive you will see the reception area is a big empty room, with a few chairs. Wires sticking out of the floor. We contacted the reception via our mobile phone, so you need an e sim. The rooms are modern but lack in sound proofing and need some bits, likes mugs with the kettle and some curtains to block the light. The blinds are not enough.Also our balcony was not sectioned off, so next-door could walk along,so lacked in privacy. Security was poor, our room door was left unlocked with our backpack in it too , until we got a room key. The balcony needs some furniture too please.

reviews.title: Recommended
reviews.text: This hotel offers cheap price but very good room, the hotel location is also strategic. I'd love to stay here again whenever I come back to Sunset Town Phu Quoc!!!
reviews.room_type: Executive Suite with Balcony and Ocean View

reviews.title: All good for a few days
reviews.positives: The room was lovely and clean with a big bathroom and big balcony which we could watch the nightly fireworks from.
reviews.negatives: Not really much of a reception or lobby, just a massive empty room, felt very strange. Sunset Town was like a ghost town so we were pretty sure we were the only ones staying at the hotel, which didn’t have much vibe or atmosphere

reviews.title: Good to stay
reviews.text: Everything is good. At night check in was a bit troublesome as the stuff is not around. Took a while for the stuff to get back with the room number before called it a night. Can be improve.

reviews.title: Nice room!
reviews.positives: Of course the bathtub! It’s huge! And i like that the balcony facing to the fireworks.
reviews.negatives: The location quite empty at night. Kinda scary to walk around the area. After staying on the second day, i noticed that there’s some ant in the room. Also, please fix the table in the balcony. We can’t use it to eat while watching fireworks, quite frustrating.

reviews.title: Good deal!
reviews.text:
I like the location! The view from the room I stayed at is very nice (tho take note that the balcony is shared and only divided by plants lol)

The room looks exactly like the photos but my only concern was there was little insects on the bed and ants by the sink (idk where they came from). Overall, you get what u paid for!)

reviews.title: Value for money
reviews.positives: Clean and good location:)
reviews.negatives: The lift a bit small:(

reviews.title: Nice room
reviews.text: Nice room with bath tub close to the tourist spot. Quite convenient, close to the night market & nearby mart. Everything closed a bit early haha but all fine. Nice room with large bed. Sure will stay here again next time.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Can see firework from my room. Have bathtub in my room 😍
I think it’s new hotel, everything new.

reviews.title: Best Budget Sunset Town Stay
reviews.text: For the price with an amazing view, our stay is unforgettable. Our room is on top floor which comes with balcony already and easy accessible rootftop. Basic amenities are provided, only water bottles are given once. Location is quite far from town center but renting a scooter is the best. Highly recommended to stay!
reviews.room_type: Executive Suite with Balcony and Ocean View

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Location was very nice, view of the kissing bridge and fireworks from room 402. Glad I had both rooms reserved to be able to access full balcony
reviews.negatives: The rooms were smaller than pictures but still very nice. Wish there was seating furniture for the balcony.

reviews.title: Comfortable Stay
reviews.text:
Pros:
- Good Location, 12 mins walk to the cable car station
- 4 mins walk to the night market (Various food selection and a big supermarket)
- As they advertised in the website
-Clean
-Very safe area although quiet at night


Cons: 
- Couldnt provide towel bcs they were late by 2 days on their laundry. We survived with small face towel only
- No proper reception n can only be contacted through the phone number they left. Thank god during check in they were bz sorting out the bedsheet, at least they were there.
- Got the balcony as we wanted but on lvl 1 so basically see nothing 
- No complimentary toothbrush and toothpaste
- False location in grab apps and google, off by 200m

reviews.title: Perfect and accurate spot to stay in Phu Quoc
reviews.positives: The sea view and best location
reviews.negatives: Could have been more clean, though the cleanliness issue was rectified by the staff within 5minutes.

reviews.title: Good option in Sunset Town
reviews.text: Faclities and location are good within Sunset Town. The only downside is the it does not have a reception and you will need a messenger app to connect with the staff. Bottled water is only given once as a welcome drinks. I would still recommend this as this is an affordable option in Sunset Town area.

reviews.title: Best location with budget friendly
reviews.positives: At amazing location and property manager Is also kind and good

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room is beautiful, and the rooftop has a view of the fireworks. The staff provides very warm and good service. The only downside is that there was no receptionist (I was a bit surprised upon arrival). It is not far from the cable car and the night market.

reviews.title: A comfortable and convenient stay in the heart of Sunset Town.
reviews.positives: I loved the beautifully designed, new room and the hotel's central location in Sunset Town—just a short walk to Kiss Bridge, the night market, and the Hon Thom cable car terminal. The staff were very kind and helpful, and they even offered a 20% discount for a nearby spa.
reviews.negatives: NA

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
The place is very quiet. If you are a lazy and slow traveler like me, you’ll love the serenity of the hotel. I also love the staff, especially Vi who goes above and beyond. She is very sweet and accommodating. 

The only downside for this hotel are: 
1. No lobby as of yet. If your flight is early and there’s no available room for early check in, you need to really plan on where to stay. 
2. If you are working remotely, you need to request for a chair and some necessities such basic utensils. Good thing Vi is so resourceful to find those for me. 

Overall, I would recommend Merci Hotel to my fellow solo female travelers. 

Shoutout to Vi for being so accommodating!

reviews.title: The room was superb, very comfy, you are very friendly as well. We really had a good time here. Next
reviews.positives: The location was awesome 👌
reviews.negatives: Nil

reviews.title: Good for the price!
reviews.text:
I like this room better than the one with the sea view. This is more clean and love how there are two big windows. Very cozy too!! For me, its all that matters since the only thing i need is a place where i can rest after roaming around sunset town. 


Customer Service can be improved but overall, this is a good one for its price

reviews.title: Great room, staff very helpful
reviews.positives: Staff member, Vi, was amazing in helping me out with tickets for the water park and showing me the town. Communication was excellent
reviews.negatives: The hotel is still new and wasn't quite finished when I arrived, but this was just the reception area. My room was great and the lack of reception had no impact on my stay.

reviews.title: Satisfied
reviews.text: We like the room so much it so cute with bathtub but have problem about hot water sometime cannot switch to cold water but i still love this hotel can watch firework from balcony very nice and price so friendly as well

reviews.title: Vi, the ""POCKET ROCKET""
reviews.positives: Vi the desk girl was so friendly and responsive. She even took me down to the ATM on her motorbike on my arrival. The room was almost new and had a huge big bath. Water was hot, television had cable. Walking distance to everything needed. Couldn't believe the price.

reviews.title: The room space is very beautiful.
reviews.text: I quite like this room, it's very suitable for a couple. The space is broad and clean. I will come back.

reviews.title: Exceeded all expectations.
reviews.positives: An immaculate, luxury hotel room at a budget price. Big comfortable bed, great views from the balcony, excellent air-con and the bath tub a joy! The location is perfect as a base for Sunset Town. I had a free firework display each night visible from my balcony.
reviews.negatives: The reception area is unfinished and not functioning. This, though, was never a problem as staff were always available when needed.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room was so pretty tbh but there’s no cleaning service during your stay, is a huge room for these prices has a Bathup just like the pictures and it was amazing

reviews.title: Great stay!
reviews.positives:
We stayed here for 1 night during our stay at Sunset Town. It is new which is why there are no reviews at the moment! We really enjoyed our stay, the rooms are just as they are pictured, lovely, modern and clean with a great view of the kiss bridge! The owner/ staff were very friendly and made sure we had everything we needed. The accommodation is just a short walk down a few set of stairs to reach the beach where there are lots of bars and restaurants. We recommend visiting the night markets which were full of atmosphere! 

Thank you for a lovely stay!

we got a balcony and we got a chance to watch a free fireworks show every day. 
very recommended tho imo it’s a hostel guys so the receptionist area isnt available 24/7

reviews.title: Great hotel
reviews.text: Except for the balcony overlooking another building, everything else is fine. Fireworks were shot right after the hotel. The internal area is very nice for a walk. The room is clean, and the bathtub is okay.

reviews.title: Affordable clean budget hotel
reviews.text:
Nice budget-friendly stay!
The hotel offers a clean and comfortable environment with friendly and helpful staff. I really appreciated the convenience of the pin-locked door system, which made it easy to return to the hotel late without needing a receptionist. The location is great too—just about a 10-minute walk to the Cable Car station and Kiss Bridge. Perfect for a simple, hassle-free stay near the main attractions!

reviews.text: First of all, the room is beautiful and clean, just like in the pictures. The staff is friendly too. The neighborhood is quiet, and the room view is great, making it a good place for couples to stay.

reviews.title: Affordable and reasonable
reviews.text: Nice for stay with bath tub. Easy to access in town. The staff also easy to reach and we can rent motorcycle also.

reviews.title: As advertised.
reviews.text: The accommodation has no reception, check-in is available after two in the afternoon. The rooms are nice, the view is good, and the water pressure is strong. I will come back to stay again.

reviews.title: Very worth it
reviews.text: We booked for 1 night to stay in the Sunset Town. Room is good, comes with balcony and there is also a big bathtub in room which is very surprising. Street is quiet at night. We really enjoyed our stay here, definitely come back next time.

reviews.title: Naza
reviews.text:
My grab driver help us to connect with the hotel staff upon our arrival around 11am. So kind of him. After few min the male staff welcome us & let us stored our luggage at the counter while waiting to c.in around 230pm. 
We are ok with that since there are so many cafes there. 
We manage to chill at Santo Cafe & enjoy the latte! 
Spacious room with complete amenities but no view since we book w/o seaview
Overall we satisfied with the services & worth our stay!

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.room_type: Executive Suite with Balcony and Ocean View

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: It's worth staying here. The room is satisfying, clean, quiet, spacious, and it's very enjoyable to stay here; 2 nights are not enough. You can see fireworks from the corridor, and the location is strategic, not far to walk to the cable car. I highly recommend this hotel.

reviews.title: Comfortable place
reviews.text: Value for money, but my suggestion is to put dustbin inside the room. Overall great

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: Introduction
reviews.text: Beautiful room, budget-friendly, just right for 2 people. It has a bathtub, very comfortable to sleep in, loved it. Highly recommended. The staff provided excellent service. Will definitely come back next time.

reviews.title: Около моста поцелуев и ночного рынка
reviews.text:
Новый отель. Модная планировка и обстановка в комнате.Рядом с ночным рынком и мостом поцелуев. До канатной дороги 10 минут пешком. С балкона виден салют и шоу гидроциклов.
Рецепшен пустой. Нам повезло,что там был человек,когда приехали. Уезжали,никого не дождались. Постель мятая и серая. Полотенца не простиранные,не приятно брать. Пыль на подоконниках.
В комнате есть все необходимое: чайник,фен холодильник. На 1-2 ночи пойдёт.
reviews.room_type: Executive Suite with Balcony and Ocean View

reviews.title: Very nice new hotel on excellent location!
reviews.text:
Very nice new hotel situated on excellent location close to the main attractions of Sunset Town. Both shower and bath were comfortable and the water was very good temperature!
Will b back!

reviews.title: เรื่องความสะอาดและการติดต่อพนักงาน
reviews.text:
ห้องขนาดปานกลาง แอร์เย็นแต่เย็นช้า พนักงานเป็นเพียงเด็ก 2 คนเท่านั้น 
ต้องใช้กูเกิ้ลคุย โทรหรือไลน์ติดต่อแจ้งปัญหาค่อนข้างยากมาก ไม่รู้ห้องอื่นเป็นมั้ย แต่ห้องที่เราได้ ห้องน้ำระบายช้า อาบน้ำทีน้ำท่วมห้องน้ำ ระเบียงห้องมีฝุ่นเยอะ ใครหวังเห็นวิว หรือพลุไม่ต้องหวังเพราะไม่เห็นได้ยินแค่เสียง (ในรูปเป็นวิวหลังห้อง)
ผ้าเช็ดตัวมีกลิ่นอับ แจ้งเปลี่ยนแล้ว ก็มีกลิ่นอับเหมือนเดิม 

ส่วนรูปภายในห้องตรงปก สิ่งของอำนวยความสะดวกมีครบ น้ำดื่มในตู้เย็นดื่มฟรี

reviews.title: Nhận xét
reviews.text:
1. Khách sạn vị trí tốt 
2. Khách sạn không có tiếp tân, không có dịch vụ thay ra giường và vệ sinh phòng mỗi ngày cả thay nước và giấy vệ sinh. Máy nước nóng không hoạt động được. Khi liên lạc thì bạn quản lý không nghe máy và không trả lời tin nhắn Zalo.  (Bạn chỉ nghe máy và trả lời một lần đầu và lần check out)

reviews.title: Dịch vụ tệ, phòng đẹp
reviews.text: Khách sạn không có tiếp tân ở vị trí đẹp, phòng có tầm nhìn đẹp để nhìn hoàng hôn trên biển & pháo bông. Nhân viên khách sạn thờ ơ, tính trách nhiệm thấp, không hỗ trợ nhận phòng sớm dù đã là 11h20, phải đợi tới 11h58 mới dắt lên nhận phòng. Nội thất phòng trang trí đẹp nhưng dơ: nệm còn tóc & bụi nhiều, rèm cửa thì xộc xệch. Phòng cách âm kém, nghe rõ tiếng xe chạy dưới đường.

reviews.title: Disappointed by stay
reviews.text:
First rule of Phu quoc: never book hotel online. 
The merci hotel: there is no reception. Only empty room. No contact number, no anything to reach the hostess. Anything related to fast check in that is written in description of hotel is not true. I called by the phone provided on agoda (and what if I didn't have a local simcard with calls????)
Then. They didn't change the linen after previous guest!!!!!!! 

The room was full of flies.
Have no any idea about the 5 stars reviews, the hotel doesn't worth it. 

The one and only advantage is a bathtub. There goes my 1 star out of 5.

reviews.title: Как можно испортить хороший отель?
reviews.text:
Очень просто — плохим управлением.

Ресепшена нет, девушка приходит только по звонку. Мы приехали за полчаса до заселения, она прислала номер комнаты… который оказался таким же, как у других гостей, заселяющихся вместе с нами. В начале второго она наконец появилась, сказала, что отправила не тот номер, и потом они полтора часа искали ключи от нашего. Просто потеряли. О подготовке к заселению, судя по всему, никто не подумал. Два заезда — уже сложность.

Я попросила: когда найдут ключи, пожалуйста, подготовьте и уберите номер. Сам номер красивый, новый, мы брали полулюкс. Но вот чистота — это отдельная история.

В постели лежали чужие волосы, и много. Постельное белье с черными и желтыми пятнами, мятое. Я даже нюхала, действительно ли оно свежее. Пахло порошком, значит, пятна просто не отстирались. Разбитый бокал, который стоял в номере при заселении, позже ещё «всплывет» в диалоге с отелем.

Уборка как услуга вообще не была обозначена. Я не знаю, есть ли она по запросу, но по факту — в номере ничего не убирали.

На следующий день я проснулась от того, что по мне полз муравей. Начала осматривать кровать — в районе матраса обнаружила их целую «бригады». Я читала такие отзывы, но думала, что в полулюксе это исключено. Еды в номере у нас не было совсем.

Двери с обратной стороны грязные, все заляпанные. Балкон — полный кошмар, ощущение, что его никогда не мыли. Черные ручки, грязные перила, мутные стекла.

Мы никому ничего не предъявляли, просто все зафиксировали на фото. И вот приходит сообщение: «Вы не хотите взять ответственность за разбитый бокал?» Тут я уже отправила фотодоказательства состояния номера при заселении. После этого мне ответили уже по-русски: «Извините, мы все исправим, пожалуйста, не пишите отзыв».

Отдельно: я писала им несколько раз за пару дней до приезда, но ни одного ответа так и не получила.

Отель сам по себе классный, новая база, красивый номер. Но ощущение, что управляющего персонала нет, а уборка на уровне «никакая». Еще немного — и отель просто убьют.

Не рекомендую. Даже при новом номере я бы сюда больше не поехала.
